name: Yuki Sanada
description: __Height:__ 172 cm Yuki has bright red hair, is socially inept and when afraid or nervous, makes a horrible, demonic face. Yuki's a bit afraid of [Natsuki](https://anilist.co/character/56143), thinks [Haru](https://anilist.co/character/56139) is very weird, and doesn't like that he considers him his friend. name: Yuu Yuutani
description: A first year student with perfect attendance, good grades, and even the respect of teachers. However, in order to get the attention of her beloved [Atori](https://anilist.co/character/354134/Atori-Mizutori) she acts as a poor imitation of a rule breaker. Her poor acting skills make her behave suspiciously when talking to Atori.

name: Bellion
description: __Rank__: Grand-Marshal Grade __Abilities__: Immense Physical Prowess, Conversation, Regeneration Bellion is a servant of Ashborn and the strongest shadow in existence. He is a huge humanoid shadow with two pairs of black wings on his back, jagged black armor, blank white eyes, and glowing light purple skin. He also carries a massive blade that looks like a centipede, which he wields both like a whip and a sword.

name: Jin Kyung
description: Jink-Yung was a fan of the idol Group, "Oh My Lady". After he calls himself a Pedophile on live TV by mistaking the word, he receives huge backlash from the viewers. His public life was effectively ruined and he spends his time inside his own room unable to leave the house because of his deep rooted fears, when suddenly one day he is summoned by an Apprentice Summoner - Maina Haze - to defeat a monster.
